primary.name: NANOGrav 15yr
primary.source_fetched: WebFetch https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.16213 (abstract); dataset DOI verified via WebFetch https://zenodo.org/records/8423265 and https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.8092551

primary.name: EPTA DR2
primary.source_fetched: WebFetch https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.16214 and https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.16214v1 (EPTA DR2 Paper III abstract); WebFetch https://zenodo.org/records/8091568 (dataset DOI)

primary.name: IPTA DR2
primary.source_fetched: WebFetch https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.03980 (IPTA DR2 context); cross-PTA context only, NOT a confirmed Hellings-Downs detection

frames: red-noise power-law spectrum: characteristic strain h_c(f) = A (f / f_ref)^alpha
spectral index alpha = -2/3 for a SMBHB population, i.e. timing-residual PSD index gamma = 13/3
A is the dimensionless characteristic-strain amplitude at f_ref
conventions.scope_trap: no naive cross-release combination; resolve to the right release. A common-spectrum process (CURN) is NOT a Hellings-Downs detection: IPTA DR2 found a common process but NO significant HD correlation, so its amplitude must not be reported as a confirmed GWB.

skeptic_threats: common-uncorrelated red noise (CURN) vs Hellings-Downs (quadrupolar) correlation: a common spectrum alone is NOT a GWB detection (IPTA DR2 case)
DM variations / solar wind / pulsar jitter mismodeling
amplitude agreement across PTAs is corroborating but is NOT itself HD-correlated evidence

frequentist p-value vs Bayesian Bayes factor: NANOGrav reports ~3.5-4 sigma frequentist AND a Bayes factor > 10^14; EPTA DR2 reports Bayes factor 60 / FAP ~0.1% (>=3 sigma) on the 10.3-yr DR2new subset

measured: number of pulsars in the analysis
inferred_under_assumptions: GWB characteristic-strain amplitude A (given a power-law spectrum)
Bayes factor / false-alarm probability for the GWB model
speculative: GWB source class: SMBHB population vs cosmic strings vs cosmological phase transition vs inflation

open_limits: GWB source class not yet distinguished (SMBHB population vs cosmological origin)
IPTA DR2 found only a common-spectrum process, not a confirmed Hellings-Downs correlation
bridges: early-universe cosmology (cosmic strings, phase transitions, inflation)
